sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107926" key="u(perfala/gghsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερφᾰλάγγ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n107926.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">outflanking of the enemy's line on both wings,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0074.tlg005:29:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">29.8</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0074.tlg005:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπερκέρασις</foreign>:—so <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερφᾰλαγγ-ίωσις</orth>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl>; and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερφᾰλάγγ-ωσις</orth>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.163</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
